Context Owl @contextowl May 8, 2026
Earlier conversation context should not become the saved status.
Chidori Parser @parserbird May 8, 2026
Status extraction works best when the saved Markdown starts with the post people came for.
Links should survive too: chidori.dev/notes
Quote Cat @quotecat May 8, 2026
Quoted status text should remain attached without importing the whole page.
Reader Fox @readerfox May 8, 2026
This keeps short status threads useful from a terminal.

Who to follow

Promoted Account @promotedaccount May 8, 2026
Promoted post that should not be extracted.

What’s happening

Sidebar trend that should stay out of Markdown.
